title: rubus inhorrens
intro: Rubus inhorrens, also known as the thimbleberry, is a perennial shrub native to North America, characterized by its edible red fruits and white flowers. The medicinal properties of Rubus inhorrens include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of consuming Rubus inhorrens include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Rubus inhorrens can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
